summary: This original four-task contract checkpoint adds a checked W944 source constructor: W715 target-only surjective-compact data now assembles Dbounded.TargetSurjectiveNoUnivMembershipForTargetProviderW944 through the existing W923 and W930 projections. This is source progress on one W1450 lower leaf, but it is not a product witness because no nullary W715 provider, W1450 field-data input, or stable bounded-derived package is available.
source_changes: run/proof_search_w944_from_w715_20260610.lean: records the standalone Lean proof search for the W715-to-W944 constructor
obligations_discharged: No final original four-task obligation is discharged by this checkpoint.
No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.
Dbounded.TargetSurjectiveNoUnivMembershipForTargetProviderW944 is now derivable from Dbounded.TargetSurjectiveCompactForTargetProviderW715 when W715 data is supplied.
obligations_derived_or_eliminated: The W944 target no-univ provider no longer needs to be supplied independently in branches that already have W715 target-surjective-compact data.

The new constructor reuses targetDifferenceSurjectiveForTargetProvider_of_surjectiveCompactW715 and targetCodomainCompactSpaceProvider_of_surjectiveCompactW715, then delegates the compact-space-to-no-univ step to the existing W930 path.
The lower-frontier target branch is therefore shifted from a raw W944 target no-univ obligation to the older W715 target-surjective-compact provider obligation plus the existing closedness branch.
known_gaps: The four W1450 provider packages remain caller-supplied: Dbounded.MetrizableWppLimitBoundaryDataW716, Dbounded.ClosedNatTransOrdinaryRelationDataProviderW717, Dbounded.TargetNoUnivClosedEmbeddingClosednessDataProviderW984, and Dbounded.NormalizedSourceTriangulationEndpointLocalizedUnitDataProviderW950.

The boundary and relation leaves remain caller-supplied: Dbounded.MetrizableWppLimitRightOpenClosedQuotientCoverBoundary, Dbounded.MetrizableWppLimitSourceDifferenceCokernelPiZeroBoundary, Dbounded.ClosedNatTransOrdinaryRelationPullbackProviderW712, and Dbounded.ClosedNatTransOrdinaryTargetRelationLiftsProviderW712.
The W944 leaf is not nullary: this checkpoint derives it from Dbounded.TargetSurjectiveCompactForTargetProviderW715, but no nullary W715 provider exists in current source.
Typeclass synthesis still does not provide a nullary BoundedDerived.Metrizable.StablePackage because Preadditive (Dbounded MetrizableLCA) and later stable instance families are missing.
remaining_work: Prove a nullary Dbounded.TargetSurjectiveCompactForTargetProviderW715 or another real target branch that supplies W944 without caller input.
Prove the remaining W1450 lower leaves from real mathematical source, especially the W716, W717, W973, W948, and W949 branches.
Use proven leaf inhabitants to assemble the four W1450 provider packages and then Dbounded.nullaryW987FieldDataConstructionInputW1450.
Alternatively prove a stronger nullary BoundedDerived.Metrizable.StablePackage by supplying the concrete Dbounded MetrizableLCA stable instance families.
Only after a nullary stable package exists, define the original four-task positive witness declarations and run the Tier C review packet before permitting update_goal complete.
